creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #8)

And isn't this done by lang/python, which sets a link from /usr/local/bin/python to /usr/local/bin/python3 (installed by lang/python3), which sets a link from /usr/local/bin/python3 to /usr/local/bin/python3.11 (installed by lang/python3.11)?

If this is the cause, could it be that reinstalling lang/python3 and lang/python helps? UPDATING entry 20240509 does not mention this ...
